name: Shrimp Savoy (Makua Tait Savoy)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup mixed green peas and corn kernels
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tomatoes stem side down; cut off top third.
2. Scoop out the tomato flesh and set aside for another dish.
3. In a mortar, pound peppercorns, coriander roots, and garlic until well combined.
4. Add the pounded mixture to ground pork in a bowl.
5. Mix in egg, fish sauce, fructose, and shallots thoroughly.
6. Incorporate peas and corn kernels, then add shrimp.
7. Stir until just mixed.
8. Divide the pork mixture evenly among the tomatoes.
9. Steam for 15-20 minutes or until cooked through and the pork is no longer pink.
10. Carefully lift the tomatoes out of their shells onto individual serving dishes.
11. Serve hot or warm.
